articles.title: Tokenmaxxing is so over. It's all about modelmaxxing now.
articles.description: Employees racked up AI bills, and companies are backpedaling on tokenmaxxing. Now, it's all about routing prompts to the most value-for-money model.

articles.title: Hong Kong now handles more than half of China’s chip imports

articles.content:
TL;DR
